⚙️ How TRAS Works

🎯 Architecture

[Input] → [Keyword Scanner] → [Mock/Claude Logic] → [Score] → [Results + PDF]

🇱🇺 Luxembourg BFSI Logic

  • Regex: guidewire|claims|kyc|aml|compliance
  • French detection: french|français|b1|b2
  • Weighted scoring: Skills 30%, Experience 25%, Education 15%, AI 20%, Communication 10%

🛠️ Tech Stack

HTML5 Tailwind CSS Vanilla JS AOS jsPDF GitHub Pages

🔐 Privacy

All analysis happens in your browser. No data is sent to servers. GDPR-compliant.
